titleStmt.title: SII 36.322: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 322. (A.R. No. 322 of 1910.) TIRUMEYÑĀNAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Jñānaparamēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete. Seems to record a gift of land for sacred food offerings to Lakshmi Rāghavadēvar by Duvēdi Būdanirāmadēvan and Duvēdi Mādēvaṉ Cheṭṭi, of Nālūr, a brahmadēya in Chēṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Kshatriyasikhāmaṇi-nāḍu. Mentions that the village assembly met in the big hall, Śrī Rājarājan, situated in front of the Samaparīśvarattu Mahādēva temple. Irrigation channels, Śrīrājarāja-vāykkal, Samparīśvara-vāykkal and a tank, Kollarkaḷ-kulam are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyum taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai manak koḷak kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaruttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅka pāṭiyu nuḷampa pāṭiyu taṭikai pāṭiyum kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻ tara Īḻa maṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu tan neḻil vaḷar Ūḻi Ellāyāṇṭun toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭey ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī korājarājarājakecaripanmarāna śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 Āvatu kṣatri
yaśikhāmaṇi nāṭṭuc ceṟṟūr kūṟṟattu brahmateyam nālūr nampimāruḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Ivvāṭṭai makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum vicākamum peṟṟa veḷḷikkiḻamai nāṉṟu Ivvūr śampariśvarattu mahādevar koyiliṉ muṉpil śrī rājarājanāṉa periyampalattey dhanmi ceytu kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Ivvūr māṭilaṉ tuvEti pūtanirāmatevanum māṭilaṉ tuvveti mātevaṉ ceṭṭiyum paṇiyāl Ivvūr tirunārāyaṇa viṇṇakar niṉṟārāṉa lakṣmirākavadevarkku tiruvamituppuṟamāka Ivvūr kaviṇiya
tuvveti ceṭṭiyeṉ kuṭutta nilaṉ kīḻpiṭākaiyāṉa kuṭittalai pāṭakam śrī rājarāja vāykku teṟku śrī simhaviṣṇu vatikku meṟku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟuk kiḻakku niṉṟa mūṉṟān tuṇṭattu nilam nālumā mukkāṇi kīḻil kiḻakaṭaiya nilaṉ Iraṇṭu māvum Itaṉmeṟki tutano nilaṉ Iraṇṭu māvil vaṭakkaṭai nilaṉ Orumā(1/2) Iṉ nilam Oru māvaraiyum Iraṇṭām pāṭakam Ittuṇṭattu Itanoṭumaṭaiya nilaṉ tma Iṉnilaṉ Araimāvumāka nilaṉ Iraṇṭumā Iṉnilaṉ Iraṇṭu māvu śrī rājarāja vāykku teṟkku vaṭakku sūyyadeva vatikku meṟku teṟkaṭainta mutaṟ kaṇṇā
ṟṟu kiḻakkaṭainta mutaṟ tuṇṭattu nilaṉ nālumā 1kāṇi ¿ kiḻakku (1/4) kiḻakkaṭai nilaṉ Orumā Iṉ nilaṉ mā Āka Ivvanaicār nilattu men vanta nilaṉ ṉ mūṉṟaraik kāṇiyum Ivvūr k key tiruvamutuppuṟamāka kuṭutta nilam niṉṟa Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku śrī simha vatikkuk kiḻakku teṟkaṭainta mutaṟ kaṇāṟṟu meṟku niṉṟum Āirattu vaṭakarait tuṇṭattu nilaṉ nālumā 1kāṇi ¿ mēṟkaṭaiya nilaṉ māṭilaṉ tuvēti nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Ittevar tiruvamutuppuṟamāka kuṭutta nilaṉ Immaṇakkuṭi Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku
Ivvatikke kiḻakku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya nilaṉ mūn_ṛumā Araimum māvaraiyiley Ivaṉ Aṣṭakattukkuppaṭṭa nilaṉ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum varkaḷ tiruvamutuppuṟamāka kuṭutta nilaṉ Ivvūrt teṉpiṭākai virkkuṭi śrī cempiyaṉ mahādevi vatikku meṟku śampariśvara vāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟuc ceṟuvu pārtti nilaṉ patiṉāṟu Ivvūr nilattu talai tta nilam Iraṇṭu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi kīḻaraiyum Ittalai
Itdevarkke Ivvūr mahāsabhaiyom tiruvamutuppuṟamāka kuṭutta nilattukkuk kīḻ pāṟkellai teṉṟiruppanaṅkāṭuṭaiya mahādevar tirunan=tavanattiṟkuṅ kollarkaḷ kuḷattukku meṟ malaiyo maṟṟu nokkic ce kke Ēṟina Aṭip pāṭṭukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai ceṟṟūrellaikkuk kiḻakku Ilaṅkuṭaiyān tillaināyakaṉ vaitta ṉṉa Ivvūr tirumayāṉamuṭaiya mahādevarkku canti Eṇṇaikkāppukkum tiruvamutukkum nāṉ paṇṇuvikkira tirunan=tavanattukku tirunan=ta
Digital edition of SII 36.322 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
